slice: Review-gated queue-compaction decision plus fail-closed contradiction-ledger validator

memory_recovered.observed: Canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE.json is a reviewed baseline while later queue-update files are append-only candidate state.
memory_recovered.inferred: Without a validator and explicit compaction decision, a reader can collapse two state layers and report unsupported canonical status.
memory_recovered.proposed: Require two distinct observation references, two distinct source identities, and a non-empty preservation rule for every contradiction record.
memory_recovered.superseded: No prior record was deleted or rewritten.
memory_recovered.unresolved: M-002 remains append-only candidate state until reviewed canonical compaction.

verification.runtime: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical committed source and test contents

privacy_boundary: Public repository files and commit metadata only. Raw private chat, health information, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads were not inspected or published.
claim_ceiling: This proves deterministic validation behavior for the committed contract and records a repository-state decision. It does not prove private-history completeness, semantic truth of every source statement, reviewed queue compaction, deployment status, or peer execution.
